metricClaims.gen29NonRegression: Pass rate held at 100% on local-smoke tier1 gate between macros+skills ON and macros+skills OFF. Cost dropped 13% (CI entirely below zero, large effect size). Gen 29 improved the loop on this scenario.
metricClaims.macroPromotionVerdictCorrectness: If the gate is statistically valid, the eval-gated capability-growth flywheel produces real compounding. Dogfooded in R2 — correctly separated robust cost signal from noisy turn signal.

shipped.gen30r2: Tangle router unblocks measurement; Gen 29 cost −13% vs off (CI [−$0.060,−$0.017], d=-2.57 large). Infra fixes: --provider/--base-url/--api-key forwarded through multi-rep scripts; createForceNonStreamingFetch wrapper for routers that default to SSE.
shipped.gen30r1: bootstrap CI + Cohen's d verdict in scripts/lib/macro-promotion.mjs — addresses audit B-H2 properly
shipped.gen29: browser-harness integration — attach to real Chrome, portable domain-skill loader, custom action macros, eval-gated promotion
shipped.gen27: stealth, anti-bot, form intelligence, CAPTCHA, card dedup, system Chrome
shipped.gen26b: site pattern learning from successful runs

criticalGap: WebVoyager 590 still stale since Gen 25. Gen 30 R3 should replicate the R2 A/B across curated-30 or the full gauntlet now that router plumbing works.
